data.raceName: WE LOVE OUR DOGS THEY LOVE TO RACE PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. SCOUT JACK is yet to miss the placings here in an excellent record which boasts five wins. Recorded a 2.75 lengths win (21.27) in a Class 3 last time at this track. Does rise in class today but still expected to be in the finish. 3. OPAWA BLAKE has missed the frame at last two runs but could not have been more impressive the run prior in his fast 25.67 win at this track over 457m. Top win three back and rates a key player again. 6. OPAWA DANNY filled a minor placing last start at this track behind Our Erin (25.90) in a Class 4/5. Has the pace to be prominent. Expected to feature. 7. UNDONE is always a threat when she races at this journey. On occasions can ping the lids.","runners":[5,3,6,7],"exclusive":false}
